mapper.select:
SELECT proc_def_count.def_id_, proc_def_count.key_, MAX(proc_def_count.var_count_) as max_var_count FROM ( SELECT prc.id_, prc.proc_def_id_ as def_id_, COUNT(*) as var_count_, def.key_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_HI_VARINST as var LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_HI_PROCINST as prc ON var.proc_inst_id_ = prc.id_ LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_PROCDEF as def ON prc.proc_def_id_ = def.id_
LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT as dep ON def.deployment_id_ = dep.id_
AND prc.start_time_ >= #{startedAfter}
AND def.deployment_id_ IN ( SELECT id_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT ORDER BY deploy_time_ DESC LIMIT #{latestDeployments} )
GROUP BY prc.id_, prc.proc_def_id_, def.key_ ) as proc_def_count GROUP BY def_id_, key_
